summary: Three models converged on the program's fiscal direction while differing on execution risk magnitude.

economic.anchor_narrative: Positioning distilled from three models. Placement is more interventionist than Macron 2017 and less than Mélenchon 2022.

social_cultural.anchor_narrative: Positioning distilled from three models. Placement is more interventionist than Macron 2017 and less than Mélenchon 2022.

sovereignty.anchor_narrative: Positioning distilled from three models. Placement is more interventionist than Macron 2017 and less than Mélenchon 2022.

dissent.reasoning: Model C read the sovereignty rhetoric as more assertive based on specific program passages.

institutional.anchor_narrative: Positioning distilled from three models. Placement is more interventionist than Macron 2017 and less than Mélenchon 2022.

ecological.anchor_narrative: Positioning distilled from three models. Placement is more interventionist than Macron 2017 and less than Mélenchon 2022.

headline.text: Déficit à 3% du PIB d'ici 2030 via revue ciblée des dépenses, sans chiffrage côté recettes.

per_model.text: Déficit à 3% du PIB d'ici 2030 via revue ciblée des dépenses, sans chiffrage côté recettes.
Trajectoire de déficit à 3% d'ici 2030, revue des dépenses non détaillée côté recettes.
Déficit ramené à 3% en 2030 sans détail sur les recettes.

economic_fiscal.summary: Program addresses the main fiscal questions partially.

problems_addressed.approach: Targeted spending review plus growth-linked receipts.
problems_addressed.reasoning: Targets are stated with budget envelopes.

problems_ignored.significance: Omitting this leaves a central fiscal risk unexamined.

problems_worsened.mechanism: Program's deficit path exceeds permitted envelope.
problems_worsened.reasoning: Explicit rejection of the stability pact constraints.

execution_risks.reasoning: Coalition arithmetic is tight on budget majorities.

budgetary.note: Targets stated but no counter-measures if growth underperforms.

reversibility.note: Could be reversed by a subsequent budget vote.
